faqs.question: Is HEC Group of Institutions a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: HEC Group of Institutions is a renowned institution offering B.Lib.I.Sc, M.Com, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, B.A, B.Com, BCA, BBA, BHM, B.Sc. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Science, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), IT & Software, Hospitality & Travel, Animation, Design. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. HEC Group of Institutions boasts an impressive review rating of 3.49 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.69 for Campus Life, 3.19 for Placements, 3.73 for Faculty, and 3.55 for Infrastructure.

placements.overview: Founded in 2002, HEC Group of Institutions is a private institute. It is located in Haridwar, Uttarakhand. HEC Group of Institutions provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 27 courses across specialisations such as Biotechnology, Chemistry, English, Fashion Design and Home Science. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. HEC Group of Institutions fees ranges between INR 31,000 to 1,41,000. HEC Group of Institutions offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Humanities & Social Sciences. HEC Group of Institutions offers all the campus facilities to students.

faqs.answer: A:    HEC Group of Institutions has received an impressive review rating of 3.19 on Placements based on 22 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: HEC Group of Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce, and have a fee structure of around INR 31,000 to 1,41,000. UG programs include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, M.Com and PG Diploma.

reviews_list.review_title: This is the review of my Bachelors degree.

review_content.Placements: There were few students in my course/department who got placed. The highest package offered in my course was 5 or 6 LPA. The lowest package offered in my course was 2 LPA. Average package offered in my course was around 3 LPA. Very few students got internship in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were very poor in my course/department. Ex – Wi-Fi was not available for students in my course/department. Labs were not good at all. review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities : computer labs, Biology labs, library, classroom, Wi-Fi Courses : professional courses like BCA and BBA is also available in hec group of institutions And the normal call courses like B.Sc. and etc. Is also available Sports : you can also take the sports from our college as a career option if you want.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good but placements are not good. The overall experience is average.

review_content.Placements: The campus is not very good. Our college provides only some internships. There are no placements. Some higher students get placements. Only 1-2 students get placed on the campus. Other students have to try off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not available. Our classrooms are significantly good. The Wi-Fi service and computers are not good. The library is just average. All types of books are not available in the library. Sports facilities are not good. They don't even try to make it good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: Placements are below average in the college. Out of the 40 students in my course, only 5 students were placed, with the highest package going up to 5.69 lakhs per annum, which was given by an Edtech company. Talking about internships, no internships are offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, considering the city and the place at which it is located. Classrooms are good. The library is providing a good collection of books. No hostel is available in the college. The canteen has a good taste, I should say; the canteen food is good and tasty. The sports and games infrastructure is improving day by day in the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best of all colleges in Haridwar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is also good. There is every facility available for students, such as a library, huge classrooms, computer labs, and also provided Wi-Fi for our needs. There is a cafeteria which makes tasty and hygienic food. The college also organises sports meets.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission to this college otherwise, you'll only regret.
reviews.review_text: There is not even a projector in the class. The classrooms are poor with chairs, etc. There is not even a small ground but only a garden. The cafeteria is the worst. Only patties are available in the cafeteria and nothing else. There is no hostel facility. Roads are not well made. One thing which is good is there is a fountain near the gate.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HEC Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are quite good. Wi-Fi is available in computer labs. Classrooms are clean and well maintained. The library contains all course-related books and also well maintained. There is no hostel facility in the college. Sports and games are held in the college time to time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and the campus environment is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are extremely good. The infrastructure of this college is good. The classrooms and surrounding of this college are very peaceful and good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college but is good for local people.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided in the college are good can be better. A canteen is available, but the quality of food served is zero. Wi-Fi is available, but the connectivity is not provided for students. Many students are afraid of such things. I like the library because it is made in good structure, but it consists of many old books only. Our seniors said that new editions are not added for many years. I like HEC sports competition because it enhances the student physically.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory results and would recommend to others.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure facility of HEC college is average. 
The classrooms and labs are well maintained.
The ground is big and clean with a good management system.
The library doesn't have many books available. 
Canteen food and medical facility are okay.
Games and sports are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in this college, like the canteen, hostel, etc.

content.Placements: I study in a good college where many big companies like HCL, Wipro, and TCS visit the college to recruit students. Many students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 12.5 LPA. Around 70% of students also get internships. They give the best opportunity for students to achieve their goals. content.Infrastructure: I like this college. It has free Wi-Fi, good classrooms and facilities. It organises many sports events. The library and building are also good. It is a great place to learn and have fun. The college organises games like cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc. Overall, the experience is very good here.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in this college except for some canteen food.

content.Placements: About 85% of students from our course get placed in many MNC companies like HCL, Wipro, TCS, etc. The highest salary package offered is 12.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges from 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like HCL, Commvault, IBM, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, etc., visit the college for placements. About 70% of students got an internship at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides free Wi-Fi, sports, and a library. Classrooms and all facilities provided by the college are good. Many sports events are organised by the college. The building of the college is good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied that I studied from here.

content.Placements: Top companies visited here to hire the right candidate. They give the best opportunity for students to achieve goals. High-rated companies also come here like Jaro, Hindustan Time, Bajaj, Alankit and many other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were good. Many programs are held, and overall it was very good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in labs. Canteen is free from hygiene. The college organises games like cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc. Overall experience was very good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college in this region.

content.Placements: Many companies visit the campus for placements, but packages offered by them are comparatively low. The college needs to focus on companies which offer good packages to the students. Training and placement department really needs to work hard and focus on improving the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but our college really needs to improve the condition of the washrooms, especially the girls' washroom. Otherwise, college is good overall. Classrooms are also good. Overall, infrastructure is good and clean. Our campus is well-ventilated.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely dissatisfied with the placements of the year 2018-19.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are not good for our batch. Around 10-15 students from my batch were placed. The packages offered by the companies are not satisfactory as the highest salary package offered was only 2-3 LPA. Also, good companies are not coming for placements because of some past reasons.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are not good. Wi-Fi facility provided here is not good, and most of the computers in the labs are not working properly. Classrooms are also not good as there is always issue with the projector. But sports and other activities are scheduled properly in college.

content.Placements: Most of the students were placed in our college, the highest package was 12 Lacs, TCS, ABB, and more companies like Infosys, Delta X. We get more internship opportunities in various companies, the top roles offered are software testing, software development, and more.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A learning environment with comprehensive facilities and strong placement support.

content.Placements: The college achieved a high placement rate with up to 100% of eligible students in certain companies. The highest package offered was approximately 9 LPA, the average package was 7 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.6 LPA. Companies such as TCS, Cognizant and Mettle are the top recruiters. The college placement is actively engaged in preparing students for the interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities at the college offer a well-maintained environment with separate accommodation for male and female students. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college has no dress code restrictions and no pressure on campus life.

content.Placements: I'm studying computer science here, and 99% of the students were placed in my computer science course. The highest package from my college was 90 lakhs per annum, and the lowest was 12 lakhs per annum. Top companies like TCS, Infosys, and other big giants are recruiting here.

content.Infrastructure: The ECE department is fully filled with amazing infrastructure and well-educated faculty members in the hostel. It is very clean and has an affordable rate. They provide nice and healthy food in the canteen and there is Wi-Fi, a washing machine and a big play area.

review_content.General: The placements are not quite good, mainly 30% of students in a batch were placed because of the companies that come to offer job and are not reputed. The salary package is not good. Only the students with super high marks got the job with high package. Most of the companies provide job out of the city. So, it is difficult for the student to accept the job, and most of the times this happens.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in the city. Good library, big classroom and each department have a separate floor. There is a computer lab available for each department like BCA, MCA. There is a stadium, a park, and well outside road available in college. The canteen is not good at all, very dirty and always dirty mostly, and the food in the canteen is not good as well, only the wrapped item is good. I can't say about the hostel room because I don't live in it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with a low fee structure and government university affiliations.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements since no MNCs have come, but as compared to Kota city, this college provides a good placement. The lowest salary offered is 1.20 lacs per annum, the average salary is 1.80 lacs per annum, and the highest salary is 3.60 lacs per annum offered by Airtel. The placement record is 70-80% and according to Kota, this is the best placement record here. But for the internship, the college hardly calls any industry, although some local startups and Bank of Baroda were invited this year for the internship. Genpact, Muthoot Finance and Amazon Voice Support came for the recruitments here.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best for study.

content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students were placed in your course. The lowest package is 2.5 lacs, and the highest package is up to 9 lacs in our course. Software development companies and cyber companies are coming to college for placements. 60 to 100 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facility of our department has good teaching staff and a good environment in our department and the students learn many types of things and we have a good lab of computers in which the college provides many things. WiFi connection on every computer and a good facility in the hostel are there.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good, but the college does not have systematic work.

content.Placements: The placements are not quite good, mainly 30% of students in a batch were placed because of the companies that come to offer job and are not reputed. The salary package is not good. Only the students with super high marks got the job with high package. Most of the companies provide job out of the city. So, it is difficult for the student to accept the job, and most of the times this happens.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in the city. Good library, big classroom and each department have a separate floor. There is a computer lab available for each department like BCA, MCA. There is a stadium, a park, and well outside road available in college. The canteen is not good at all, very dirty and always dirty mostly, and the food in the canteen is not good as well, only the wrapped item is good. I can't say about the hostel room because I don't live in it.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with a low fee structure and government university affiliations.

content.Placements: There are no placements since no MNCs have come, but as compared to Kota city, this college provides a good placement. The lowest salary offered is 1.20 lacs per annum, the average salary is 1.80 lacs per annum, and the highest salary is 3.60 lacs per annum offered by Airtel. The placement record is 70-80% and according to Kota, this is the best placement record here. But for the internship, the college hardly calls any industry, although some local startups and Bank of Baroda were invited this year for the internship. Genpact, Muthoot Finance and Amazon Voice Support came for the recruitments here.
